v1_2_disposition_rationale: Mechanism structurally executable on Llama-3.2-3B (training updates values; key registration intact; F-2 dispatch preamble effective). Discriminator gate at canonical hparams (init_epsilon=1.0, key_id=-1, generation=False) structurally never fires at any probe — key registered at target-position activation, probes produce pre-target activations 6.4–8.7× outside eps-ball. Replay-precedent risk LOW.
v1_3_amendment_scope: Adapter mechanism non-viability AT canonical-spec hparams (NOT architectural-invariant elimination). Refines kickoff §7 'mechanism-class elimination stronger than v1.0' framing — elimination is hparam-class-scoped, not adapter-class-wide. v1.0 + v1.1 (rank-1-in-weight) remain the architectural-invariant ceiling claims; v1.3 adds a hparam-conditional ceiling for adapter class.

potential_remediations_out_of_scope.training: values L2 norm = 335 (post-edit) vs ~46 expected for random init in [0,1)^3072; std = 6.03
potential_remediations_out_of_scope.gradient: Adam updated values from initial ~46 to ~335 L2 norm; gradient must have flowed through adapter from loss
potential_remediations_out_of_scope.discriminator: L17 probes: dist ∈ [6.39, 8.65], eps=1.0; key registered at target-position (post-target activation); probe queries are pre-target activations by sequence structure; structural mismatch.

successor_session_scope: T.1 alt-model under MEMIT runbook v0.1 authoring (resumes t_branch §5'-α canonical path). Adapter elimination at canonical hparams merges with rank-1-in-weight elim for purpose of WS3 implementation guidance, but operator may pursue hparam-corrected GRACE retry as orthogonal investigation.
